response: <<Jeanette is>> <<practicing her>> <<juggling.>> * * * <<Each week>> <<she can>> <<juggle 2 more>> <<objects than>> <<the week before.>> <<If she starts out>> <<juggling 3>> <<objects and>> <<practices for 5>> <<weeks, how many>> <<objects can she>> <<juggle?>> * * * <<The calculation>> <<is as follows:>> <<Week 1: 3 objects>> <<Week 2: 5 objects>> <<Week 3: 7 objects>> <<Week 4: 9 objects>> <<Week 5: 11 objects.>> <<She can juggle 11>> <<objects after 5>> <<weeks.>> <<Finally, she can juggle 11>> <<objects after 5>> <<weeks.>> <<The last word is>> <<cost.>>
